title: duranta repens f. serrata
intro: Duranta repens f. serrata, also known as the golden dewdrop or sky flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Verbenaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The leaves and stems of the Duranta repens f. serrata plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
